task: Rebuild monitoring system (pulse.ps1) from scratch — Xiaosong said retro system was too buggy/complex
what_worked: Built clean PS5-compatible pulse.ps1 with 4 checks: PORT_HEALTH, XIAOSONG_UNANSWERED, FILE_LANDING_SLA, STAGE_TIMEOUT
Used ConvertTo-Hashtable helper for PS5 JSON compat (no -AsHashtable)
From-UnixTime epoch math instead of Get-Date -UnixTimeSeconds
New-Object + .Add() for List[string] instead of cast syntax
Went through 5 versions, 3+ QA rounds - shipped v5 GK-approved
Completion detection broadened to match emoji-prefixed DONE and 'Source:' patterns
2h max-age guard on stage markers - stale threads never nudged
what_failed: v1-v3 had multiple PS5 compat bugs (expression-in-cast, AsHashtable, UnixTimeSeconds)
NUDGE loop bug: DONE/FINAL were in STAGE_MARKERS causing false positives on completed threads
Completion detection regex too narrow - missed ':white_check_mark: DONE' and 'Source:' patterns
Multiple hotfix rounds needed before v5 was clean
lesson: PS5 PowerShell is restrictive. Key constraints: no if-expression inside cast, no -AsHashtable, no Get-Date -UnixTimeSeconds. Always test with powershell.exe (PS5), not pwsh (PS7). DONE/FINAL must never be in STAGE_MARKERS. Completion detection must match actual agent post patterns including emoji prefixes.
user_feedback: Xiaosong: 'Retro monitoring system, too many bugs and too complex, analyze my requirements first and create clean solution to meet that'
